title: PokeWay
description: A Cobblemon mod pack with more tecnical stuff like applied energistics 2
body:
This is a carefully made collection of mods designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by integrating Pokemon gameplay, advanced technology, performance optimizations, quality of life improvements. Whether you are a trainer, a tech enthusiast, or just looking to improve your Minecraft adventure, this modpack has something for everyone. Enjoy :)

.
### **Cobblemon Related Mods**

**Cobblemon**: A mod that integrates Pokémon-like gameplay into Minecraft, including capturing, battling, and training pokemons

**Ascension Megamons (Cobblemon):** Adds mega evolutions

**CobbleDollars**: Introduces an economy system with currency, allowing for trade with Merchants

**Cobbled Battle Watcher**: Adds tools for monitoring and managing Cobblemon battles, enhancing gameplay dynamics

**Cobbledex: Recrafted**: adds a Pokédex

**Cobblemon - Fight or Flight**: Pokemon can now fight the player or run away when agitated

**Cobblemon Counter**: Tracks various Cobblemon-related statistics and counters, enhancing gameplay tracking

**Cobblemon Integrations**: Connects Cobblemon with other mods, allowing for enhanced interoperability and features

**Cobblemon Move Inspector**: Provides detailed information about Cobblemon moves, aiding in strategy and training

**Cobblemon Myths and Legends Addon**: Introduces legendary and mythical Cobblemon, adding depth and rare creatures

**Cobblemon Pokenav**: Adds a navigation device for tracking and locating Cobblemon in the game world

**Cobblemon Spawn Notification**: Alerts players to nearby rare Legendary or Shiny spawns

**Cobblemon Unimplemented Items**: Adds items planned for Cobblemon but not yet fully integrated, allowing early access

**Cobblemon Size Changer**: Allows players to change the size of their Cobblemon

**Cobblemon: Cobble it**: Shows the Pokemon types while hovering looking at it

**CobblemonExtras**: Adds additional content and features to the Cobblemon mod, enriching gameplay

**Cobblemore**: Expands Cobblemon with additional content, creatures, and features

**Cobblemounts**: Allows players to ride their Cobblemon, providing new transportation options

**Cobblenav Counter Integration**: Integrates Cobblenav with the counter system, enhancing tracking and navigation

**Cobbreeding**: Adds breeding mechanics to Cobblemon

**Fossilmon**: Adds Pokemon Fossils

**Gravel's Extended Battles**: adds new moves and abilities

**LuckyCobble**: Adds a Cobblemon-based lucky block

**PokePlushie for Cobblemon**: Introduces plushies of Cobblemon creatures

**Where Are My TMs**: Adds Tm's and Tr's

### **Tech Mods**

**Applied Energistics 2**: Introduces a complex storage and automation system using networks of blocks and cables.

**Applied Energistics 2 Wireless Terminals**: Enhances Applied Energistics 2 by adding wireless access to your storage network.

**CC: Tweaked**: An updated version of ComputerCraft, providing programmable computers and turtles for automation.

**Energized Power**: Introduces new power systems and energy-based mechanics to the game

**Extended Drawers**: Adds storage drawers for improvements for item management

**Flux Networks**: Adds wireless energy networks for more efficient power management and distribution.

**PowerAE2CC Bridge**: a bridge between Applied Energistics 2 and ComputerCraft

### **Quality of Life**

**Nature's Compass**: Adds a compass that helps players locate specific biomes in the game world.

**Polaroid Camera**: Adds a camera item that lets players take and display photographs in-game.

**Simple Voice Chat**: Adds voice chat functionality to the game, allowing players to communicate vocally.

**Traveler's Backpack**: Adds a customizable backpack with extra storage and functionality for adventurers.

**Wand of Better Building**: Provides tools for easier and more efficient building and construction.

**FindMe**: Helps players locate items with a simple search function

**Better Furnaces Reforged**: Upgrades Minecraft furnaces with new tiers, features, and enhanced smelting capabilities

**Waystones**: Adds teleportation waystones for quick travel between locations

**AppleSkin**: Adds detailed food and hunger-related information to the HUD, such as saturation

**Better Third Person**: Improves third-person camera controls, offering a smoother and more customizable experience

**Configured**: Simplifies mod configuration by providing an easy-to-use interface for adjusting settings

**Controlling**: Enhances control over keybindings, making it easier to search and manage them

**Iris Shaders**: Adds shader support for enhanced graphics and visual effects.

**Just Enough Items**: Displays item recipes and uses in-game, simplifying crafting and item management

**JEITweaker**: Allows customization of Just Enough Items (JEI), enabling tailored item lists and recipes

**Just Enough Resources (JER)**: Adds resource information to JEI, showing where to find materials and their uses

**Mod Menu**: Adds a mod management interface to the game, allowing players to enable, disable, and configure mods

**Not Enough Animations**: Adds and improves animations for various actions, enhancing visual feedback.

**Stendhal**: enhanced visual utilities for books, signs, anvil and the in-game chat

**Searchables**: Adds a search function to various inventories and interfaces, improving item management

**LambDynamicLights**: Adds dynamic lighting to entities and items, improving illumination effects

### **Food Related**

**Food TXF**: Expands food options, adding new items and recipes.

**Food+**: Adds a variety of new food items and cooking recipes to the game.

### **Libraries**

**Impactor**: A developer API providing a common interface across minecraft platforms

**Architectury API**: Provides a cross-platform modding API for easier development and compatibility

**Balm**: A lightweight library mod that provides shared code for other mods

**Cloth Config API**: Provides a configuration library for Minecraft mods, enhancing settings management

**Factory API**: Provides an API for creating factory and automation-related mods

**Fabric Language Kotlin**: Enables Kotlin programming language support for Fabric mods

**GooeyLibs**: A library of graphical user interface elements and utilities for mod developers

**MidnightLib**: Provides a library of shared code and utilities for Midnight mods, simplifying development

**Patchouli**: Adds an in-game guide book system, helping players learn about mods and gameplay mechanics.

**Cardinal Components API**: Offers a framework for adding custom components to entities, items, and other game elements.

### **Performance Mods**

**Clumps**: Consolidates experience orbs into larger ones, reducing lag and improving collection efficiency.

**FastAnim**: Speeds up animations for a smoother and faster gameplay experience

**ImmediatelyFast**: Improves performance by optimizing various game mechanics and rendering processes.

**Indium**: Improves rendering performance and compatibility with various mods.

**Krypton**: Enhances server performance by optimizing network handling and reducing lag.

**Lithium**: Optimizes various game mechanics to improve performance and reduce lag.

**Memory Leak Fix**: Addresses and fixes memory leaks, improving game stability and performance.

**Sodium**: Significantly improves rendering performance and graphics optimization.

**Sodium Extra**: Adds additional features and options to the Sodium mod, enhancing its functionality.

**Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks**: Reintroduces vanilla-like smooth lighting to non-full blocks

**FeyTweaks**: Mod for optimizing signs and beacons

### **Other**

**Immersive Paintings**: Adds customizable paintings to the game

**Cosmetic Armor**: Allows players to wear armor for appearance while keeping the stats of another set of armor

**Trinkets**: Introduces new slots and items for accessories, enhancing character customization (used for Cosmetic Armor)

**Easy Item List**: Automatically adds server side custom items from recipes to the clients JEI

**PokeWay Recipes**: Mod make to link other mods to PokeWay, like making lucky cobbles craftable
